question: 每个省份有多少用户？
sql: SELECT a.province, COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id) AS user_count FROM users u INNER JOIN user_addresses a ON u.user_id = a.user_id GROUP BY a.province ORDER BY user_count DESC

question: 每个省份有多少客户？
sql: SELECT a.province, COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id) AS user_count FROM users u INNER JOIN user_addresses a ON u.user_id = a.user_id GROUP BY a.province ORDER BY user_count DESC

question: 有多个收货地址的用户有多少？
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS multi_addr_users FROM (  SELECT u.user_id   FROM users u   INNER JOIN user_addresses a ON u.user_id = a.user_id   GROUP BY u.user_id   HAVING COUNT(a.address_id) > 1) t

question: 有多个收货地址的客户有多少？
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS multi_addr_users FROM (  SELECT u.user_id   FROM users u   INNER JOIN user_addresses a ON u.user_id = a.user_id   GROUP BY u.user_id   HAVING COUNT(a.address_id) > 1) t

question: 没有设置默认地址的用户有哪些？
sql: SELECT u.user_id, u.username FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_addresses a ON u.user_id = a.user_id AND a.is_default = 1 WHERE a.address_id IS NULL

question: 没有设置默认地址的客户有哪些？
sql: SELECT u.user_id, u.username FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_addresses a ON u.user_id = a.user_id AND a.is_default = 1 WHERE a.address_id IS NULL

question: 查出所有一级分类及其下属的二级分类
sql: SELECT p.category_name AS parent_category, c.category_name AS child_category FROM categories p INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.parent_id WHERE p.level = 1 ORDER BY p.category_name, c.category_name

question: 列出所有一级类目和它们的二级子分类
sql: SELECT p.category_name AS parent_category, c.category_name AS child_category FROM categories p INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.parent_id WHERE p.level = 1 ORDER BY p.category_name, c.category_name

question: 每个一级分类下有多少个子分类？
sql: SELECT p.category_name AS parent_category, COUNT(c.category_id) AS child_count FROM categories p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.parent_id WHERE p.level = 1 GROUP BY p.category_id, p.category_name ORDER BY child_count DESC

question: 各一级类目分别包含多少个二级分类？
sql: SELECT p.category_name AS parent_category, COUNT(c.category_id) AS child_count FROM categories p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.parent_id WHERE p.level = 1 GROUP BY p.category_id, p.category_name ORDER BY child_count DESC

question: 统计每个一级品类的子分类数量
sql: SELECT p.category_name AS parent_category, COUNT(c.category_id) AS child_count FROM categories p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.parent_id WHERE p.level = 1 GROUP BY p.category_id, p.category_name ORDER BY child_count DESC

question: 包含'手机'关键字的分类及其所有子分类
sql: SELECT p.category_name AS parent_category, c.category_name AS child_category FROM categories p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.parent_id WHERE p.category_name LIKE '%手机%'

question: 名称中含有'手机'的分类和它的下级分类
sql: SELECT p.category_name AS parent_category, c.category_name AS child_category FROM categories p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.parent_id WHERE p.category_name LIKE '%手机%'

question: 每个分类的销售额是多少？
sql: SELECT p.category_id, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category_id ORDER BY total_sales DESC

question: 每个类目的销售额是多少？
sql: SELECT p.category_id, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category_id ORDER BY total_sales DESC

question: 销售额最高的前10个商品是什么？
sql: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 10

question: 按销售额排名，前10名商品有哪些？
sql: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 10

question: 各品牌的总销量是多少？
sql: SELECT p.brand, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY total_quantity DESC

question: 各牌子的总销量是多少？
sql: SELECT p.brand, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY total_quantity DESC

question: 哪些商品被购买的数量最多？
sql: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 10

question: 购买数量最多的商品排名
sql: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 10

question: DSR三项均分都高于4.5的店铺有哪些？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, AVG(r.description_score) AS avg_desc, AVG(r.service_score) AS avg_service, AVG(r.logistics_score) AS avg_logistics FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id HAVING avg_desc > 4.5 AND avg_service > 4.5 AND avg_logistics > 4.5

question: DSR三项均分都高于4.5的商家有哪些？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, AVG(r.description_score) AS avg_desc, AVG(r.service_score) AS avg_service, AVG(r.logistics_score) AS avg_logistics FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id HAVING avg_desc > 4.5 AND avg_service > 4.5 AND avg_logistics > 4.5

question: DSR三项均分都高于4.5的商户有哪些？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, AVG(r.description_score) AS avg_desc, AVG(r.service_score) AS avg_service, AVG(r.logistics_score) AS avg_logistics FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id HAVING avg_desc > 4.5 AND avg_service > 4.5 AND avg_logistics > 4.5

question: 有图评价占比最高的店铺是哪个？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, SUM(r.has_image) / COUNT(*) AS image_ratio FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY image_ratio DESC LIMIT 1

question: 有图评价占比最高的商家是哪个？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, SUM(r.has_image) / COUNT(*) AS image_ratio FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY image_ratio DESC LIMIT 1

question: 评价数量最多的前5个店铺
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(*) AS rating_count FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY rating_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: 评价数量最多的前5个商家
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(*) AS rating_count FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY rating_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: 评价数量最多的前5个商户
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(*) AS rating_count FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY rating_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: 店铺的平均服务评分排名
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, AVG(r.service_score) AS avg_service FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY avg_service DESC

question: 商家的平均服务评分排名
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, AVG(r.service_score) AS avg_service FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY avg_service DESC

question: 商户的平均服务评分排名
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, AVG(r.service_score) AS avg_service FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_ratings r ON s.store_id = r.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY avg_service DESC

question: 各支付方式的支付笔数和总金额
sql: SELECT p.payment_method, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, SUM(p.amount) AS total_amount FROM orders o INNER JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY p.payment_method ORDER BY total_amount DESC

question: 各支付方式的付款笔数和总金额
sql: SELECT p.payment_method, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, SUM(p.amount) AS total_amount FROM orders o INNER JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY p.payment_method ORDER BY total_amount DESC

question: 各支付方式的流水笔数和总金额
sql: SELECT p.payment_method, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, SUM(p.amount) AS total_amount FROM orders o INNER JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY p.payment_method ORDER BY total_amount DESC

question: 支付成功的订单金额总和
sql: SELECT SUM(p.amount) AS total_paid FROM orders o INNER JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id WHERE p.payment_status = 'success'

question: 已成功支付的订单总金额是多少？
sql: SELECT SUM(p.amount) AS total_paid FROM orders o INNER JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id WHERE p.payment_status = 'success'

question: 支付状态为成功的交易合计金额

question: 使用微信支付的订单有多少？

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS wechat_order_count FROM orders o INNER JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id WHERE p.payment_method = 'wechat'

question: 通过微信付款的交易数量是多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS wechat_order_count FROM orders o INNER JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id WHERE p.payment_method = 'wechat'

question: 每个用户购买过的品类有哪些？
sql: SELECT u.user_id, u.username, COUNT(DISTINCT p.category_id) AS category_count FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY u.user_id ORDER BY category_count DESC

question: 购买金额最高的前10个用户
sql: SELECT u.user_id, u.username, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_spent FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id GROUP BY u.user_id ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10

question: 各快递公司承运的订单数量
sql: SELECT s.carrier, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o INNER JOIN shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id GROUP BY s.carrier ORDER BY order_count DESC

question: 按快递公司统计承运的交易数量
sql: SELECT s.carrier, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o INNER JOIN shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id GROUP BY s.carrier ORDER BY order_count DESC

question: 已经发货但未签收的订单有哪些？
sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, s.carrier, s.status AS shipment_status FROM orders o INNER JOIN shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id WHERE s.status IN ('in_transit', 'picked_up')

question: 哪些订单已发货但还没被签收？
sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, s.carrier, s.status AS shipment_status FROM orders o INNER JOIN shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id WHERE s.status IN ('in_transit', 'picked_up')

question: 处于运输中的交易列表
sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, s.carrier, s.status AS shipment_status FROM orders o INNER JOIN shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id WHERE s.status IN ('in_transit', 'picked_up')

question: 使用顺丰配送的订单有多少？

question: 使用顺丰配送的交易有多少？
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS sf_order_count FROM orders o INNER JOIN shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id WHERE s.carrier = 'sf'

question: 各店铺举办了多少场营销活动？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(c.campaign_id) AS campaign_count FROM stores s LEFT JOIN campaigns c ON s.store_id = c.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY campaign_count DESC

question: 各商家举办了多少场营销活动？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(c.campaign_id) AS campaign_count FROM stores s LEFT JOIN campaigns c ON s.store_id = c.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY campaign_count DESC

question: 各商户举办了多少场促销？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(c.campaign_id) AS campaign_count FROM stores s LEFT JOIN campaigns c ON s.store_id = c.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY campaign_count DESC

question: 平台级的活动有哪些？
sql: SELECT campaign_id, campaign_name, campaign_type FROM campaigns WHERE store_id IS NULL

question: 平台级的促销有哪些？
sql: SELECT campaign_id, campaign_name, campaign_type FROM campaigns WHERE store_id IS NULL

question: 平台级的营销活动有哪些？

question: 正在进行中的促销有多少？

question: 正在进行中的营销活动有多少？
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_count FROM campaigns WHERE status = 'active'

question: 各类优惠券的领取数量
sql: SELECT c.coupon_type, COUNT(uc.id) AS claim_count FROM coupons c INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id GROUP BY c.coupon_type ORDER BY claim_count DESC

question: 按优惠类型统计领券数量
sql: SELECT c.coupon_type, COUNT(uc.id) AS claim_count FROM coupons c INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id GROUP BY c.coupon_type ORDER BY claim_count DESC

question: 各类型优惠券分别被领取了多少张
sql: SELECT c.coupon_type, COUNT(uc.id) AS claim_count FROM coupons c INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id GROUP BY c.coupon_type ORDER BY claim_count DESC

question: 核销率最高的是哪个优惠券？
sql: SELECT c.coupon_id, c.coupon_name, SUM(CASE WHEN uc.status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS use_rate FROM coupons c INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id GROUP BY c.coupon_id ORDER BY use_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: 哪张优惠券的使用率最高？
sql: SELECT c.coupon_id, c.coupon_name, SUM(CASE WHEN uc.status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS use_rate FROM coupons c INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id GROUP BY c.coupon_id ORDER BY use_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: 被使用比例最高的优惠券是哪张
sql: SELECT c.coupon_id, c.coupon_name, SUM(CASE WHEN uc.status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS use_rate FROM coupons c INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id GROUP BY c.coupon_id ORDER BY use_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: 还有剩余数量的优惠券有哪些？
sql: SELECT coupon_id, coupon_name, remain_count FROM coupons WHERE remain_count > 0 ORDER BY remain_count DESC

question: 哪些优惠券还有库存？
sql: SELECT coupon_id, coupon_name, remain_count FROM coupons WHERE remain_count > 0 ORDER BY remain_count DESC

question: 使用了优惠券的订单平均优惠金额是多少？

question: 使用了优惠券的交易平均优惠金额是多少？
sql: SELECT AVG(o.discount_amount) AS avg_discount FROM orders o INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON o.order_id = uc.order_id WHERE o.coupon_id IS NOT NULL

question: 使用优惠券下单的用户有多少？
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS coupon_user_count FROM orders o INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON o.order_id = uc.order_id WHERE o.coupon_id IS NOT NULL

question: 使用优惠券下单的客户有多少？
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS coupon_user_count FROM orders o INNER JOIN user_coupons uc ON o.order_id = uc.order_id WHERE o.coupon_id IS NOT NULL

question: 每个交易包含多少件商品？

sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, oi.product_name, oi.refund_status, oi.refund_amount FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.refund_status = 'approved'

question: 每个店铺有多少个上架商品？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM stores s INNER JOIN products p ON s.store_id = p.store_id WHERE p.status = 'on_sale' GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY product_count DESC

question: 每个商家有多少个上架商品？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM stores s INNER JOIN products p ON s.store_id = p.store_id WHERE p.status = 'on_sale' GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY product_count DESC

question: 各店铺的交易数量和总金额是多少？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_gmv FROM stores s INNER JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY total_gmv DESC

question: 各商家的交易数量和总金额是多少？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_gmv FROM stores s INNER JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY total_gmv DESC

question: 各商户的订单数量和总金额是多少？
sql: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_gmv FROM stores s INNER JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY total_gmv DESC

question: 各一级分类的订单数和销售额是多少？
sql: SELECT pc.category_name AS top_category, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id INNER JOIN categories pc ON c.parent_id = pc.category_id GROUP BY pc.category_id ORDER BY total_sales DESC

question: 各一级类目的订单数和销售额是多少？
sql: SELECT pc.category_name AS top_category, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id INNER JOIN categories pc ON c.parent_id = pc.category_id GROUP BY pc.category_id ORDER BY total_sales DESC

question: 各一级品类的订单数和销售额是多少？
sql: SELECT pc.category_name AS top_category, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_sales FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id INNER JOIN categories pc ON c.parent_id = pc.category_id GROUP BY pc.category_id ORDER BY total_sales DESC
